Keycloak should import the realm on startup via --import-realm. (3) Document how to start and access Keycloak in a README or CLAUDE.md update. This replaces the prior 'implement auth from scratch' description — we use Keycloak as the IdP.

Source: definition-of-done.md:36-40.

title: Define domain event catalog — typed events with validators

This blocks everything — event sourcing, projections, SSE, and protocol gateway all depend on a formal event catalog.
